final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    input [11:0] d,
    output reg [11:0] q
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    // Always block triggered on the rising edge of the clock
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= d;  // Load the input data into the register when enabled
        end
    end

endmodule
